subject: chemistry
title: Identify the oxidized species
given: the reaction Zn(s) + Cu²⁺(aq) → Zn²⁺(aq) + Cu(s)
find: which species is oxidized and which is reduced
steps: Zn goes from oxidation number 0 to +2 — it loses electrons.
Cu goes from +2 to 0 — it gains electrons.
Loss of electrons is oxidation; gain is reduction (OIL RIG).
answer: Zn is oxidized; Cu²⁺ is reduced
